prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: hero poster. Story world: Crown of Salt. Premise: A relic-smuggling cartel launders artifacts through a city that disappears at dawn tide.. Setting: Port authority archives and salt catacombs. Threat presence: The Salt Regent. Recurring motifs: salt crowns, wet ledgers, cargo seals. Create premium launch key art that introduces player mission stakes and iconic environmental cues with poster-level composition.. Subgenre: occult conspiracy. Tone: CINEMATIC. Immediate scene brief: Crown of Salt Story Key Art. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Compose a high-end key art image with a dominant focal threat, layered foreground and background storytelling, a strong silhouette, and clear thematic clues embedded in the environment. Keep it elegant, unsettling, and market-ready.
source_prompt: Story: Crown of Salt (crown-of-salt) | Hook: A relic-smuggling cartel launders artifacts through a city that disappears at dawn tide. | Subgenre: occult conspiracy | Tone: CINEMATIC | Location: Port authority archives and salt catacombs | Villain: The Salt Regent | Villain worldview: Order comes from controlled sin, not clean law. | Motifs: salt crowns, wet ledgers, cargo seals. Create premium launch key art that introduces player mission stakes and iconic environmental cues with poster-level composition.
